examples.text: There are 30 children in Zone 4 who haven't eaten in two days, their families have no food.
examples.reasoning: Explicit mention of food deprivation for children.

examples.text: The water pipe in Block 7B has been broken for a week, no clean water available for ~200 residents.
examples.reasoning: Infrastructure failure affecting water access.

examples.text: Old lady near the Dharavi junction, 78 years old, needs regular medicine but no family support.
examples.reasoning: Elderly person requiring ongoing medical and social support.

examples.text: Slum fire in Kurla East last night — 15 families displaced, need temporary shelter immediately.
examples.reasoning: Emergency displacement requiring immediate shelter.

examples.text: A young man in Zone 2 is showing signs of severe depression, self-harm threats reported by neighbors.
examples.reasoning: Acute mental health crisis with self-harm risk.

examples.text: Kids in the Bandra slum can't attend school — no materials, fees due for 3 months.
examples.reasoning: Education access barrier due to financial constraint.

examples.text: Three women near Andheri West lost their street vending license, need income support.
examples.reasoning: Livelihood disruption for street vendors.

examples.text: Diabetic patient in Zone 6, out of insulin — can't afford refill, urgent medical need.
examples.reasoning: Acute medical access need: lack of insulin is life-threatening.

examples.text: Flooding in Sion Koliwada — 50 households cut off, drinking water contaminated.
examples.reasoning: Flood-related water contamination emergency.

examples.text: TB patient in Govandi stopped treatment midway, community health worker unresponsive.
examples.reasoning: Incomplete TB treatment is a public health risk.

examples.text: Zone 3 mein bachhon ko khana nahi mil raha, teen din se bhookhe hain, koi madad karo.
examples.reasoning: Children without food for three days.

examples.text: Dharavi ke paas budhiya akele hai, dawai chahiye aur khana bhi nahi.
examples.reasoning: Elderly woman alone without food or medicine.

examples.text: Block 12 mein pani nahi aaya teen din se, sab log pareshan hain.
examples.reasoning: Three days without water in residential block.

examples.text: Kurla mein aag lagi, ghar jal gaye, log sadak par hain, raat ko reh nahi sakte.
examples.reasoning: Fire destroyed homes, emergency shelter needed.

examples.text: Andheri mein ek ladka bahut dukhi hai, rota rehta hai, kuch galat kar sakta hai.
examples.reasoning: Mental health crisis with concerning behaviour.

examples.text: Bandra slum mein school fees nahi bhari, bacche school se bahar hain.
examples.reasoning: Education exclusion due to unpaid fees.

examples.text: Govandi mein ek bandi ki TB ki dawai khatam ho gayi aur nai nahi aa rahi.
examples.reasoning: TB medicine ran out, treatment gap.

examples.text: Zone 5 mein rehri wale ko thela chhinn liya, abhi koi kamai nahi.
examples.reasoning: Livelihood loss due to street cart confiscation.

examples.text: Sion mein barish ke baad naali ka paani ghar mein ghus gaya, saaf paani nahi.
examples.reasoning: Sewage flooding contaminating water supply.

examples.text: Zone 8 mein 10 families ko ghar nahi, koi building tod di nagar palika ne.
examples.reasoning: Municipal demolition leaving families homeless.

description: Few-shot examples for Gemini NLP classifier — English + Hindi transliteration
